questions.question: Which countries have conditional transport targets?
questions.note: Targets whose classification or wording marks them as conditional (typically on international support or finance), in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries have transport mitigation targets in active documents?
questions.note: Countries with at least one target classified under 'Transport sector mitigation target'.

questions.question: Which countries state a net zero target?
questions.note: Targets classified as 'Net zero target' in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries mention gender in transport content?
questions.note: Keyword match on 'gender' across targets and measures in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries address freight?
questions.note: Keyword match on freight-related terms across targets and measures in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries include electric mobility measures?
questions.note: Mitigation measures in the 'Electric mobility' category or mentioning electric vehicles, in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries commit to public transport measures?
questions.note: Mitigation measures in public/collective transport categories or wording, in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries include transport adaptation measures?
questions.note: Countries with at least one transport adaptation measure in active documents.

questions.question: Which countries have already submitted a 3rd generation NDC?
questions.note: Countries with at least one NDC 3.x document in the database.

questions.question: Which countries have a Long-Term Strategy (LTS) in the tracker?
questions.note: Countries with at least one LTS document recorded.
